notes: v1.14.148 - SITE-NODE HEADER ANCHOR. Replaced the header shield art with the approved site-node pin (single hex shell, gold-ringed location pin, violet->cyan->teal rim). Drop-in byte-swap on the existing icons/phantom-shield-256.webp (same filename -> no precache edit; URL-keyed cache busted by the version bump). FORK A (John's call): the anchor's function is UNCHANGED - the #hdr-ghost-btn still toggles #hdr-overflow-menu (BACKUP/RESTORE/SET IDENTITY/ACTION STRIPE/HW REF/SITE PROFILE); only the art changed. alt='System' retained (still opens the system/utilities menu). Rationale for keeping the behavior: John chose the drop-in over re-routing to site-profile-direct (which would have orphaned the other 5 utilities). Added an HTML naming-debt comment on the img (filename is legacy, was shield). Square-hex vs tall-shield geometry: header centering was tuned around the tall shield - baseline alignment is a DEVICE-VERIFY item; width left at 42 (a width tweak on the img line is the only fix if the pin reads low/small - John's call on device, not pre-emptive). ?legacy=1 byte-identical: the shield/site-node art is body.rd-only (.hdr-shield-img{display:none} default; body.rd -> inline-block); legacy still shows the ghost img. Three-stamp lockstep 147->148. Gates: node --check x3 + sw.js, CSS brace balance unchanged, version.json valid JSON, 0 lone-LF, three stamps read 148. DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved, HARD-STOP - do not self-approve the visual): close+reopen (no Clear Website Data), confirm boot reads v1.14.148, header anchor now shows the site-node PIN (not the shield), tapping it still opens the SAME overflow menu (BACKUP/RESTORE/SET IDENTITY/ACTION STRIPE/HW REF/SITE PROFILE) - route unchanged, pin + SYS pill + wordmark sit on one baseline (if the pin reads low/small, fix = width tweak on the img line only), ?legacy=1 unchanged (ghost img, no site-node). PRIOR .147 = depth-shadow restore + BOM tile (blue rebrand complete); .143 = shield 42px; .142 = Stage 2 shield.
